name: cost-tracker
description: Tracks AI API token usage and costs per agent, project, and task. Budget alerts and spend dashboards.
author: SoftBacon Software

configSchema.label: Daily Budget ($)
configSchema.description: Daily spend limit in USD. 0 = no limit.

configSchema.label: Weekly Budget ($)
configSchema.description: Weekly spend limit in USD. 0 = no limit.

configSchema.label: Alert Threshold (%)
configSchema.description: Send alert when budget usage exceeds this percentage

configSchema.label: Cache Read Price ($/MTok)
configSchema.description: Cost per million cached input tokens
